characters.permanent_features: 留有小胡须，神情冷峻而沧桑，常戴着一顶宽大的竹编斗笠遮住额头。
光头，头顶有金色梵文状的刺青/伤疤，面目凶恶，留有短络腮胡。

storyboards.speaker: R1
storyboards.scene_description: 昏暗的古代客栈内，戴着竹斗笠的剑客R1神色冷静，微微低头，开口向对方发出死亡宣告。
storyboards.lighting_description: 暖色调侧光照亮其面部下半部分，背景黑暗，营造出神秘而危险的气氛。
storyboards.camera_movement: 近景特写，微弱的手持呼吸感。
storyboards.positive_prompt: 1man, close-up shot, Chinese swordsman R1 wearing a conical bamboo hat, black traditional clothing, mustache, intense eyes, in an ancient Chinese tavern, dim warm lighting, cinematic film grain, 8k resolution.
storyboards.negative_prompt: modern, blurry, bright daylight, female, clean shaven

storyboards.scene_description: 光头大汉R2正坐在桌前，手里撕咬着一块干粮。听到R1的挑衅后，他的动作瞬间凝固，眼神变得极其凶狠和警惕，死死盯住对面的R1。
storyboards.lighting_description: 昏暗的暖光灯火，高光打在R2的光头和面部，阴影深重，凸显其面部狰狞的肌肉和刺青。
storyboards.camera_movement: 中景镜头，聚焦于光头大汉R2，前景有R1的模糊肩膀，形成对峙感。
storyboards.positive_prompt: 1man, close-up shot of a fierce bald bandit leader R2 with golden scalp tattoos, wearing rugged dark armor, holding a piece of bread, shocked and angry expression, inside a dusty ancient Chinese inn, dramatic candle light, high contrast.
storyboards.negative_prompt: hair, smiling, modern background, soft photography, bright colors

storyboards.scene_description: 剑客R1与光头大汉R2无声对峙。R1的手迅速伸向腰间，握住剑柄准备拔剑。随后镜头快速切到R2，他意识到了危险的逼近，神色一震。
storyboards.lighting_description: 强烈的明暗对比，昏暗的客栈内部，光影交错，暗示冲突一触即发。
storyboards.camera_movement: 快速剪辑。先是R1中景，随后特写其手部伸向剑柄，接着快速拉回R2的脸部特写，富有节奏感和压迫感。
storyboards.positive_prompt: action sequence, close-up of a hand grabbing a sword hilt, martial arts tension, swordsman wearing bamboo hat R1, bald bandit R2 reacting with alarm, ancient Chinese tavern, dim and dusty atmosphere, fast-paced cinematic editing.
storyboards.negative_prompt: peaceful, smiling, modern, bright daylight, static camera
